highlights:
APA Corporation has expanded its partnership with Palantir Technologies to leverage AI technology across its oil and gas operations[1]. The multi-year, multimillion-dollar extension to their 2021 enterprise agreement introduces new artificial intelligence capabilities with Palantir's Artificial Intelligence Platform (AIP) software[1]. Over the past three years, Palantir has helped APA deploy software across operational planning, supply chain management, maintenance planning, production optimization, and contract management[1]. While APA shows significant AI integration in operations, the company's hiring signals reveal minimal AI emphasis in workforce development, with 0% of job postings mentioning AI across all departments[2].

results.title: Senior AI/ML Engineer at Jobgether - United State | Visa Sponsorship Jobs
highlights:
# Senior AI/ML Engineer
...
We are seeking a highly skilled AI/ML Engineer to develop advanced AI and ML solutions for the energy and utility sector. The ideal candidate will have a strong background in machine learning engineering, AI systems design, and large-scale data-driven decision-making. The role requires collaboration with cross-functional teams to design, build, and deploy scalable machine learning systems.
...
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to design, develop, and deploy scalable AI and machine learning solutions integrated into production systems
...
Build reusable Python libraries and engineering components to support ML pipelines, data processing workflows, and AI system development
...
Python AWS Azure GCP Databricks LangChain LangGraph LlamaIndex Hugging Face AutoGen
...
This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for an AI / ML Engineer in the United States.This role sits at the intersection of machine learning engineering, AI systems design, and large-scale data-driven decision-making, focused on solving complex challenges in the energy and utility sector. You will contribute to the development of advanced AI and ML solutions that combine predictive modeling, optimization, and generative AI to support critical infrastructure and sustainability goals. Working closely with data scientists and software engineers, you will help design, build, and deploy scalable machine learning systems that power real-world applications. The environment is highly collaborative and innovation-driven, with a strong emphasis on applied AI, production readiness, and measurable impact. You will work across diverse use cases including forecasting, geospatial analysis, and intelligent decision systems. This is a high-impact role where your work directly supports the modernization and efficiency of energy systems.Accountabilities
...
- Collaborate with cross-functional teams to design, develop, and deploy scalable AI and machine learning solutions integrated into production systems.
...
- Build reusable Python libraries and engineering components to support ML pipelines, data processing workflows, and AI system development.
...
- Contribute to the design and implementation of modern AI architectures, including RAG systems, LLM integrations, and agent-based workflows.
...
- Support database design and optimization, including writing efficient queries for large-scale data processing and retrieval.
...
- Translate complex machine learning and AI requirements into structured technical tasks and actionable development plans.
...
- Stay current with advancements in machine learning engineering, generative AI, and AI orchestration, integrating best practices into workflows.
...
- Master’s degree in Computer Science, Data Science, Software Engineering, or related field (PhD preferred).
...
- 7+ years of experience building, deploying, and maintaining machine learning systems in production environments.
...
- Strong proficiency in Python, including experience building reusable packages and scalable data pipelines.
...
- Hands-on experience with cloud platforms such as AWS, Azure, or GCP, including CI/CD and containerized deployments.
...
- Solid understanding of ML system design, MLOps principles, and end-to-end model lifecycle management.
...
- Experience with distributed computing frameworks and relational/non-relational databases.
...
- Familiarity with Databricks and large-scale data processing environments.
...
- Experience working with generative AI frameworks such as LangChain, LangGraph, LlamaIndex, Hugging Face, or AutoGen.
...
- Exposure to agentic AI systems, AI orchestration, or LLM-based decision workflows is highly desirable.
...
- Nice to have: experience in the utility, energy, or power sector and strong Databricks expertise.
...

...
The Data Architect provides the technical leadership for Landmark’s AAM/UEM data platform — the layer that ingests, normalizes, and exposes oil & gas data (subsurface, drilling, well planning, production, finance, HSE) for the application layer and, increasingly, for external operators. You will own the data model, the ingestion and harmonization strategy across heterogeneous source systems, and the architectural roadmap for the AI-augmented data workflows that set the platform apart from a generic “ingest everything” data lake.
...
This is a deliberately technical, hands-on architecture role. It pairs day-to-day with an internal Data Platform Product Manager, who owns the “what and why” on the product and customer side, while you own the “how” on the data side. The two roles were created together so that customer outcomes and data architecture move in step rather than in opposition. You will work closely with engineers, data scientists, and domain experts, and your decisions about how the platform models and serves data will shape what the product can credibly promise.
...
AI-Augmented Data Workflows
...
- Own the architecture for AI-augmented data workflows — retrieval-augmented generation, semantic and vector search, and agentic pipelines — that make the platform’s data genuinely useful to engineers and scientists, not just stored.
- Decide where AI belongs in a data platform for upstream oil & gas, separating real, high-value use cases from buzzwords, and build the patterns the rest of the team will follow.
- Stay hands-on enough to prototype and validate these workflows yourself, using modern AI-assisted development tools as part of your daily working practice.
...
- Master’s degree in Computer Science or a closely related STEM discipline.
...
- Extensive experience in data architecture — data modelling, schema design, ingestion patterns, data cataloguing, governance, and event-driven data flows.
...
- Hands-on experience with modern cloud data platforms and tooling (e.g. Azure, Microsoft Fabric, SQL and cloud databases, vector databases, graph databases).
...
- Practical, shipped experience with AI-augmented data workflows — RAG, semantic and vector search, and agentic pipelines — not just evaluation or demos.
...
- Comfort with AI-assisted development tools (e.g. Claude Code, Copilot, Cursor, MCP-based workflows) in daily work.
...
- Familiarity with ontology- or meta-model-driven integration approaches.
- Experience with modern agentic AI frameworks (e.g. LangChain, LangGraph, Pydantic-AI) and the patterns for putting them into production.

Monitor and analyze model performance and iterate to improve accuracy and robustness.

# Experienced Data Scientist – AI/Machine Learning Developer – Generative AI Platform Development

Join arenaflex, and you'll be part of a team that's changing the world one innovation at a time. We are currently seeking a talented and passionate Data Scientist to join our Cloud Technologies Application Platform team and help us build the future of developer experience through cutting-edge artificial intelligence solutions.
...
Are you ready to take your career to the next level with a company that values innovation and excellence? arenaflex is looking for an experienced Data Scientist to join our dynamic team as an AI/Machine Learning Developer. In this role, you will be instrumental in designing and executing our artificial intelligence strategy to elevate our developer experience platform to unprecedented heights.
...
This is a unique opportunity to work at the forefront of generative AI technology, collaborating with multidisciplinary teams to develop innovative solutions that will transform how developers create applications at arenaflex. You'll leverage your expertise in machine learning, deep learning, and large language models to solve complex business challenges and drive measurable impact across the organization.
...
As a Data Scientist at arenaflex, you will be responsible for driving our AI initiatives and contributing to the development of next-generation developer tools. Your key responsibilities will include:
...
Design, develop, and implement machine learning models and algorithms that enhance our developer experience platform, ensuring alignment with arenaflex's overall technology strategy.
...
Build, train, and fine-tune machine learning models, including foundation models and large language models, to address various business problems and improve developer productivity.
...
Choose appropriate machine learning algorithms, train models, and calibrate hyperparameters to achieve optimal predictive performance and model accuracy.
...
Apply deep expertise in transformer architecture, vector embeddings, and advanced ML techniques to develop solutions that solve complex business challenges.
...
Lead model deployment for experimentation, implementing A/B testing, monitoring model performance, and iterating on solutions based on empirical results.
...
Work closely with AI engineers, software developers, product managers, and other data scientists to deliver end-to-end AI-enabled solutions.
...
Experience with training models or utilizing foundation models and fine-tuning them to meet custom business requirements.
...
Bachelor's degree in Data Science, Computer Science, Statistics, Mathematics, or a related
...
Minimum of 5+ years of progressive experience in the software industry with a focused specialization in machine learning and artificial intelligence.
...
Strong understanding and extensive experience with cutting-edge machine learning algorithms, deep learning architectures, statistical modeling, and large language models.
...
- Advanced degree (Master's or PhD) in Data Science, Computer Science, or related field

- Experience applying machine learning techniques specifically in developer productivity or software development lifecycle contexts

- Knowledge of cloud platforms and infrastructure (AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud)

- Familiarity with MLOps practices and deployment pipelines

- Published research or contributions to open-source machine learning projects

- Experience with prompt engineering and LLM optimization techniques
...
If you are passionate about artificial intelligence, machine learning, and want to work on projects that will shape the future of technology, arenaflex is the place for you. We are looking for individuals who bring enthusiasm, dedication, and fresh perspectives to their work – people who are ready to push boundaries and achieve extraordinary results.

There are two sides to every technology, and AI is no exception. While it replaces human costs for companies by substituting human labor in repetitive tasks, it introduces significant infrastructure costs. Similarly, it reduces energy consumption through massive efficiency gains, yet building and hosting these models carries its own heavy energy requirements.

results.title: Akriti Gupta
highlights:
Data Scientist II at SLB | LLM Agents · RAG · Multi-Agent Systems
...
Data Scientist 2 at [SLB](https://www.linkedin.com/company/slbglobal)
...
I'm a Data Scientist and AI Engineer at SLB, where I build production-grade LLM systems, multi-agent pipelines, and RAG architectures that solve real enterprise problems at scale. Over the past two years I've shipped systems that reduced per-analyst research costs by 90%, cut anomaly detection false positives by 80%, and reduced equipment startup identification time from 6 hours to 10 minutes. Most recently I've been contributing to Tela - SLB's publicly launched agentic AI platform building equipment-specific agents that fetch live operational data, perform domain calculations, and gives structured diagnostic reports. I hold 3 provisional patents on AI systems I've built, and I led SLB's internal AI Fluency Lab, a 150+ member community running GenAI bootcamps and expert speaker sessions to drive AI literacy across the organization. My stack: LangChain, LangGraph, RAG, multi-agent systems, OpenAI API, Anthropic API, Pixtral, Milvus, Python, and more. I'm a Master's graduate from the University of Pennsylvania and I'm passionate about building AI agents. Feel free to reach out at akritigup97@gmail.com.
